docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CRIMMINS, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT MCVICKER, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SEVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: SC ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 MAILED TO DEFENDANT KEVIN MCVICKER.
